comment: Soft readiness bands — advisory only, rendered differently, never gating. All requirements implicitly soft.

data.name: Corrupted Gauntlet readiness
data.notes: CG is self-supplied inside; prep = stats + regular-Gauntlet practice, not gear.

data.name: ToA entry-mode readiness
data.notes: 150-invocation farming point comes much later; entry mode is learnable well below these bands.

data.name: The Whisperer readiness
data.notes: Shadow-of-the-storm mechanics punish low HP pools hardest of the DT2 four.
